name: objectIs
description: A vendorable Object.is polyfill bundle based on the dependency-free object-is 1.1.0 release. Useful when you want the classic shim behavior locally without pulling in newer helper packages.
summary: This page ships an Object.is polyfill bundle based on the old dependency-free release line. The value is to keep SameValue semantics local and inspectable without carrying the newer helper graph.
nativeAlternative: Object.is exists in modern runtimes, but old compatibility layers and cleanup work may still want a vendorable shim with the familiar export shape.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Bundled from the dependency-free release line, then rule-based normalized for copy-paste into modern TS projects.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Single-file CommonJS bundle preserving the package's polyfill export shape.

note: Current object-is releases pull in helper packages. This snippet intentionally uses the simpler 1.1.0 release line as a vendorable first pass.
